Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope

Class MainApplicationScope

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope.AbstractApplicationScope
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope.MainApplicationScope
All Implemented Interfaces:
ApplicationScope, JvmScope, AutoCloseable
public final class MainApplicationScope extends AbstractApplicationScope
ApplicationScope for the main codebase.

    • getGlobalConfiguration

      public GlobalConfiguration getGlobalConfiguration()
      Returns:

      public Supplier<ThreadConfiguration> getThreadConfiguration()
      Returns:
      the configuration of all verifiers invoked by the current thread

      Returns:
      the default configuration (value may change with every invocation)
